mnemonics.title: PASS Objects
mnemonics.content: Passed As Shared Secrets. When you pass an object as a parameter, you are sharing a secret reference, not making a fresh copy.

mnemonics.title: Reference Rules
mnemonics.content: References Rule Everything. Objects are passed by reference, not by value, so changes made inside a method persist outside.

mnemonics.title: POUR Method
mnemonics.content: Pass Objects, Understand References. When passing objects to methods, remember that the method receives a copy of the reference, not the object itself.
